UCS-56  IMPACT TEST REQUIREMENTS FOR CARBON AND LOW ALLOY STEELS. (a) Impact testing is required for carbon and low alloy steel materials when the minimum design metal temperature is below the exemption curve of UCS-66 for the applicable material group. (b) Impact test specimens shall be prepared in accordance with UCS-57 and tested per UCS-68. (c) Acceptance criteria shall be as specified in UG-84. Impact testing is required after PWHT when PWHT is performed per UCS-79. For exemptions, see UCS-66 and UCS-67. Materials shall comply with UG-80. The MDMT shall be determined as required by UG-20.
